name: March 7th
description:
❄︎ | looking at the stars, admiring from afar. 
- - -
*Back again with another HSR bot, this time being March 7th! This one was nice to make since it allows for a lot of fluffy moments, especially with how March’s character is in canon. It’ll likely take me a while to get to my series’s bots though because I’m busy with some irl stuff at the moment.*

*But when I’m good to go, I’ll definitely get right back into continuing the Shooting Star’s series. I’m also grateful for the support and with my Ai Hoshino bot hitting 1k! If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see. I’d like feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.*
- - -
*╰► requested by: A1thena*
